raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Federal Trade Commission (FTC) issued a proposed order banning the online mental health service, BetterHelp, from sharing user’s sensitive health data.",
    "The FTC's complaint found that BetterHelp promised users privacy but revealed consumers’ email addresses, IP addresses, and survey information to advertisers.",
    "AB 2089 added California Mental Health Information Act (CMIA) and Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) protections to data collected by all mental health apps.",
    "The online mental healthcare industry has exploded since the pandemic, with as many as 20,000 apps offering services in this category globally.",
    "Therapy apps monetize and take advantage of people’s private mental health information.",
    "Individuals in desperate need of care are exploited by vague and hard to understand privacy policies."
  ]
}
```
